title: APIs: DSP UX Widget Class
text: APIs: DSP UX Widget Class UX Widget Class APIs allow users to build a consistent UX/UI. It opens up parts of Uniface needed to efficiently interact with the core of Uniface, while providing proper isolation of concerns keeping the development of custom constructs easy and maintainable. UX Widget Class APIs support field-level, entity-level (collection and occurrence), and component-level widgets. The sub-sections showcase the list of currently supported APIs. For details on UX Widget States and API Functions, see UX Widget States and API Functions . API Function Applicability Matrix This section provides a quick reference for UX Widget Class API functions and their applicability across different widget types. The following table shows which API functions are available for each widget type: API Function Field Collection Occurrence Component Phase Notes processLayout() Static Provides initial HTML layout constructor() Creation Creates widget instance onConnect() Connection Connects widget to DOM mapTrigger() Connection Maps triggers to DOM events dataInit() Data Binding Initializes data binding dataUpdate() Data Change Updates widget with new data dataCleanup() Unbinding Cleans up widget before unbind/reuse getValue() Validation Returns widget's value validate() Validation Validates widget value showError() Validation Displays validation error hideError() Validation Clears validation error blockUI() Server Call Disables user interaction unblockUI() Server Call Re-enables user interaction Legend : = Function is called for this widget type = Function is not called for this widget type Related Links UX Widget States and API Functions The following sections explain various UX widget states and it's API functions.
